description: Embedded identity claim. Carried as a C2PA assertion in a signed asset, this is a self-asserted statement by the signer that the content was created under the atproto identity at the given DID. A verifier should not trust this claim on its own — it MUST be cross-checked against an active app.provcheck.signingKey record under the same DID whose fingerprint matches the C2PA signing certificate. When that cross-check holds, the verifier may auto-populate its identity-bar UI from this claim instead of asking the user to type it.

did.description: DID of the creator. Source of truth. Verifiers resolve this DID to find the matching app.provcheck.signingKey collection.

handle.description: Display hint only. The handle a user is likely to recognise (e.g. 'creator.bsky.social'); useful for the verifier UI to render before the DID resolution completes. Verifiers MUST NOT use this as the trust anchor — the DID is.

version.description: Schema version of this claim. Currently always 1. Reserved for future expansion of the claim's fields without breaking older verifiers.
